boundaries: Keep planning focused on the lighter supporting VM chapters listed in this wave.
Keep VM-21 and VM-22 out of scope for this wave unless separately approved.
Keep cross-references review-only unless the same batch also captures the referenced operational section.
Keep stale, superseded, repealed, companion, or implementation guidance as notes only.
exclusions: No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.

reviewStandards.regulatoryRequirement: Treat explicit must, shall, or required language as the requirement; preserve the exact citation and chapter context.
reviewStandards.definitionOrTerminology: Treat terms, glossary material, and term-boundary clarification as definition or terminology content.
reviewStandards.reportingRequirement: Treat filing, submission, or report-content instructions as reporting requirements.
reviewStandards.documentationExpectation: Treat retention, support-file, narrative, exhibit, or evidence language as documentation expectation content.
reviewStandards.governanceControlExpectation: Treat oversight, review, assignment, approval, or control language as governance or control content.
reviewStandards.crossReferenceMapping: Treat references to other chapters, manuals, or documents as cross-reference mapping unless the same batch also captures the referenced operational section.
reviewStandards.explanatoryBackground: Treat introductory prose, examples, context, or navigation language as explanatory or background content unless the text imposes an obligation.
reviewStandards.staleSupersededCompanionGuidance: Treat repealed, superseded, companion, or implementation guidance as review-only support rather than authoritative text.
reviewStandards.requiresHumanInterpretation: Treat assumptions, margins, model selection, reserve judgment, or boundary cases as requiring human actuarial interpretation unless the text is explicit.

appReady: export is sanitized, stable, and versioned
ragReady: review status no longer requires human disposition

currentChecksNeeded: Plan file exists and parses as JSON.
The supporting plan markdown exists and carries the expected headings.
Every proposed batch is review-only by default.
The plan explicitly excludes VM-21 and VM-22.
The plan remains review-only and not learner-facing or app-ready.
futureChecksSuggested: Chapter-window checks for VM-01, VM-02, VM-25, VM-26, VM-30, and VM-31.
Cross-reference flag coverage for the supporting chapter wave.
No learner-facing, app-ready, or RAG-ready promotion checks.
Batch-definition synchronization once supporting extraction starts.
scriptImplications: scripts/batch-definitions.mjs should stay synchronized with the planned batch-013 onward sequence when extraction is authorized.
scripts/validate-scaffold.mjs should verify that the supporting plan file exists, parses cleanly, and preserves the VM-21 / VM-22 exclusion.

notes: Controlled supporting-chapter planning artifact. Planned batches 013-021 remain review-only by default and are not extraction runs.
